---
title: "Graduate Program — Faculty and Stuff Resources"
---

A collection of links and documents useful for faculty advising graduate students and stuff assisting faculty.


::: {.resource-card}
### Graduate Handbook
The official handbook covering program requirements, policies, and procedures.

[View Graduate Handbook](handbook/index.html){.btn .btn-primary}
:::

::: {.resource-card}
### Admission System
Review and evaluate graduate applicants through the admission system.

[Visit the Admission System Website](http://go.unl.edu/grad-admit){.btn .btn-primary}
:::

::: {.resource-card}
### Offer Letter Request Form
Submit a request to generate an offer letter for a new or existing student.
See the [Offer Letter](offer-letter.qmd) page for more details.

[Submit Offer Letter Request](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSeupuR_eY2r1kgI58g_GwN_kWPKI2zisCxuJLwsuDWDa9odgg/viewform){.btn .btn-primary}
:::
